title: daviesia umbellulata var. angustifolia
intro: Daviesia umbellulata var. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Daviesia, is a flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Daviesia umbellulata var. angustifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a decoction or infusion, often used to treat various health conditions.
